did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that summarizes and analyzes existing literature on deep learning techniques for dermoscopic differential diagnosis. It does not conduct original experiments or use AI to obtain new primary results; rather, it reports on the performance metrics (accuracy, sensitivity, specificity) of previously published CNN/DCNN models from other studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
